Opportunity Details

Name Of Post :UPSRTC उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य सड़क परिवहन निगम Bus Conductor Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 Online Form
Post Date / Update :13 July 2026 | 09:55 AM
Short InformationUttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (UPSRTC) has released the advertisement of UP Bus Conductor Recruitment Notification 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested with Uttar Pradesh Bus Conductor Gorakhpur District Can Apply Online 08/07/2026 to 16/07/2026 . For other information related to Uttar Pradesh UPSRTC New recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale, District Wise Vacancy, and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.
उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य सड़क परिवहन निगम (UPSRTC) UPSRTC Gorakhpur Conductor Recruitment 2026 UPSRTC GKP Conductor 2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012
Important Dates Application Begin : 08/07/2026 Last Date for Apply : 16/07/2026 Interview Date : As per ScheduleApplication Fees General / OBC / EWS : 0 /- SC / ST : 0 /- No Application Fee for the All Candidates.
UPSRTC Gorakhpur Conductor Notification 2026 : Age Limit Details Minimum Age : 18 Years Minimum Age  : 40 Years Age Relaxation as per उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य सड़क परिवहन निगम Gorakhpur UPSRTC Conductor Outsourcing Recruitment 2026 Rules.
UPSRTC Conductor Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 145 Post
District NameTotal Post — UPSRTC Conductor Eligibility Details
Gorakhpur Conductor145 — 10+2 Intermediate Exam in Any Recognized Board in India. CCC Exam Passed.
How to Fill UPSRTC Conductor Online Form 2026 Conductor recruitment in Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation, which is being done this time through outsourcing. Candidates who are eligible and interested in UPSRTC Gorakhpur Conductor Recruitment will have to apply through Uttar Pradesh Sevayojan Portal (Rojgar Sangam). After registering in Uttar Pradesh Sevayojan Portal (Rojgar Sangam) and updating their qualification as well as CCC information in the profile, the candidate will get the option of Apply Job in UPSRTC Conductor Recruitment, read the information and apply. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Offline
